review: Oh look, another guy not from Chicago saying you gotta try Lou's. How revolutionary. I don't care, go pay your respects and order the butter crust. Also, feel free to take one home on the plane â deep dish is harder to kill than a werewolf.

update: Ubiquitous but the original locations are still excellent.
